name: Swimming
definition: Movement through water with extra movement cost
full_text: While you're swimming, each foot of movement costs 1 extra foot (2 extra feet in Difficult Terrain). You ignore this extra cost if you have a Swim Speed and use it to swim. At the DM's option, moving any distance in rough water might require a successful DC 15 Strength (Athletics) check.

mechanics.cost: 1 extra foot per foot (2 extra in Difficult Terrain)
mechanics.swim_speed_exception: Ignore extra cost with Swim Speed
mechanics.rough_water: DC 15 STR (Athletics) check optional per DM
